creator: max@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

The port of this program had been submitted earlier from someone else.  
(CF: PR #3935.) 
Apparently I overlooked this PR and imported the other submission, though, 
if you could look at what is in ports-current and send in diff to improve  
the port, we'd be more than happy to review it and integrate it into  
what we have now.
